name: starshot
description: Cloudflare Worker and universal CLI tools for screenshot links.

scripts.config:check: sh -c 'if [ -f .varlock/profiles/starshot.env ]; then varlock load -p .env.schema -p .varlock/profiles/starshot.env; else varlock load -p .env.schema; fi'
scripts.dev: sh -c 'config=""; if [ -f wrangler.local.toml ]; then config="-c wrangler.local.toml"; fi; if [ -f .varlock/profiles/starshot.env ]; then varlock run -p .env.schema -p .varlock/profiles/starshot.env -- bunx wrangler dev $config; else varlock run -p .env.schema -- bunx wrangler dev $config; fi'
scripts.deploy: sh -c 'config=""; if [ -f wrangler.local.toml ]; then config="-c wrangler.local.toml"; fi; if [ -f .varlock/profiles/starshot.env ]; then varlock run -p .env.schema -p .varlock/profiles/starshot.env -- bunx wrangler deploy $config; else varlock run -p .env.schema -- bunx wrangler deploy $config; fi'
scripts.agent: sh -c 'if [ -f .varlock/profiles/starshot.env ]; then varlock run -p .env.schema -p .varlock/profiles/starshot.env -- bin/starshot.ts agent "$@"; else varlock run -p .env.schema -- bin/starshot.ts agent "$@"; fi' --
scripts.list: sh -c 'if [ -f .varlock/profiles/starshot.env ]; then varlock run -p .env.schema -p .varlock/profiles/starshot.env -- bin/starshot.ts list "$@"; else varlock run -p .env.schema -- bin/starshot.ts list "$@"; fi' --
scripts.sync: sh -c 'if [ -f .varlock/profiles/starshot.env ]; then varlock run -p .env.schema -p .varlock/profiles/starshot.env -- bin/starshot.ts sync "$@"; else varlock run -p .env.schema -- bin/starshot.ts sync "$@"; fi' --
